verificationNote: Primary source: Moonshot AI official blog (kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3) confirms Kimi K3 release as 2.8T open model; Xinhua (state news agency) published 2026-07-17 01:40:30 confirming the same event with required date displayed. Event, primary source, and exact date verified.
title: Moonshot unveils Kimi K3, world's largest open-weight model
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model with native vision and a 1-million-token context window, available on Kimi.com and API; full weights by July 27.
whyItMatters: First open model to reach the 3T-parameter class, narrowing the gap between open and proprietary frontier AI.
shareText: Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a 2.8T-parameter open-weight model with 1M-token context — the largest open model to date. Full weights by July 27. (Xinhua)
xPost: Moonshot AI unveils Kimi K3: 2.8T-parameter open-weight model, 1M-token context, native vision. Largest open model yet; weights by Jul 27. https://english.news.cn/20260717/66d0dd4a939b430ab2334c766a92ea93/c.html
linkedinPost: Moonshot AI has released Kimi K3, a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight LLM with native vision and a 1-million-token context window — the largest open model announced to date. Full weights are expected by July 27. Source: Xinhua https://english.news.cn/20260717/66d0dd4a939b430ab2334c766a92ea93/c.html
